meta.title: Kamaehu Gym | AI Food Logging That Actually Understands Asian Cuisine
meta.description: Finally, an AI that understands soto ayam, nasi padang, and pho. Component-level macro breakdowns, adaptive metabolism tracking, and research-backed nutrition.

hero.headline: Finally, an AI that
hero.subheadline: Log soto ayam, nasi padang, or pho — and get accurate macros with component-level breakdowns. Not guesses. Real understanding.
hero.subheadline2: Plus adaptive metabolism tracking, research-backed protein targets, and workout logging — all in one app built by a lifter, for lifters.

aiFoodLog.headline: Not just a calorie guess.
aiFoodLog.description: Most food AIs give you a number and call it done. Ours shows its work, lets you correct it, and actually understands the food you eat.

componentBreakdown.title: Component-Level Breakdown
componentBreakdown.description: See exactly how the AI calculated your meal — chicken, noodles, sambal, fried shallots — each item listed with its own macros. No black-box totals.

reasoning.title: AI Reasoning Panel
reasoning.description: The AI explains its logic: "Detected soto ayam with vermicelli noodles. Added sambal based on visible condiment." Trust through transparency.

refinement.title: Conversational Refinement
refinement.description: "Actually, I had extra rice" — just type it. The AI adjusts the estimate without starting over. Iterate until it's right.

cookingOil.title: Cooking Oil Prompt
cookingOil.description: The #1 source of under-logging. Our AI asks "Add cooking oil?" when it detects fried foods — catching the calories most apps miss.

validation.title: Self-Validation Layer
validation.description: Before showing results, the AI checks for obviously wrong macros — like 500g protein in a salad. Catches errors before they hit your log.

asianFoods.title: Asian & Indonesian Foods
asianFoods.description: Soto ayam, goi cuon, nasi padang, pho, rendang — recognized with cultural accuracy. Kecap manis, sambal, bawang goreng understood natively.

contrast.othersDescription: Scan barcode → get a number → hope it's right.
contrast.kamaehuDescription: Describe or photo your meal → see the breakdown → refine until it's accurate.

features.headline: Built on research,
features.description: Every algorithm cites its sources. Every recommendation has a reason. We don't guess — we calculate, measure, and adapt.
features.citationFooter: Protein targets based on Morton et al. 2018, Helms et al. 2014, Schoenfeld & Aragon 2018

comparison.headline: What makes Kamaehu Gym
comparison.description: We built the app we couldn't find. Here's what that means.
comparison.footer: Comparison based on publicly available features of popular fitness and nutrition apps. We don't name names — we just built what they don't do.

founder.headline: Built by a lifter,
founder.description: Kamaehu isn't a product designed by committee. It's the app I built because I needed it — and couldn't find it anywhere else.
founder.quote: I got tired of apps that didn't understand the food I actually eat, that used psychology tricks to keep me anxious, and that felt designed by people who've never stepped inside a gym. So I built Kamaehu.
founder.testimonialPlaceholder: User testimonials coming soon — we're still in beta

download.headline: Try Kamaehu Gym
download.description: Log your first meal with our AI. See the component breakdown. Get your adaptive calorie targets. All free during beta.
download.androidNotice: Android version coming soon. Sign up for updates below.
